description:
Medical prescription. 10 black Ḥawrānī figs should be turned into a paste, put on a cloth (khirqa) and then applied on the affected area. This procedure should be repeated several times. Several options for the diet are specified at the bottom.

Verso: Two lines in Arabic script, mention ailment (wajʿ), might be a continuation of recto or a separate prescription.
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
